visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in a dimly lit room, looking forward with a serious expression. In the background, other people are visible, including one man in a light-colored shirt who is on a phone call. The room appears to be an office or command center, with multiple computer monitors and a bulletin board with photos.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, conversational tone, followed by a second male voice speaking in a more urgent, questioning tone.
